name: QNI : Inbound Email with Suspicious Subject
notes:
This rule triggers when a flow content includes an email subject that matches known suspicious subjects included in a Threat Intelligence feed. This could indicate spam or phishing.

Note: The Phishing Subjects reference set is pre-populated with email subject examples and can be tuned with new discoveries.
conditions_text: when the flow context is Remote to Local
when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Mail Applications in Flows
when any of Content Subject are contained in any of Phishing Subjects - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Inbound Email with Suspicious Subject on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Remote to Local
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Mail Applications in Flows
AND when any of Content Subject are contained in any of Phishing Subjects - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Inbound Email with Suspicious Subject
Event description: Detects when a flow content includes an email subject that matches known suspicious subjects included in a Threat Intelligence feed. This could indicate spam or phishing.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
